opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't breathe through my nose at all and it's making me panic every time I lie down, like I'm going to smother. I've had a blocked, runny nose and this annoying dry cough for a few days and I haven't slept properly. The saline sprays from the chemist aren't doing anything.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been getting worse over the last 12 hours and the cough is keeping me awake all night — I'm exhausted and a bit scared about the breathing.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 3 days ago it started as a scratchy sore throat and feeling run down
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 days, worse in the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: first a runny nose and lots of sneezing, now my nose is completely blocked and stuffy with a tickly dry cough
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the blockage is really bad and the lack of sleep is wearing me down, but I can still get around
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my nose and the back of my throat, and the cough is in my throat
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, feels worst when I lie down to sleep
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — the saline spray barely helps
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying down and the dry air-conditioning in my bedroom
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: felt a bit feverish earlier today, and I'm tired, but no real chest pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get colds like most people but this blockage feels worse than usual
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't sleep, dragging myself through the day

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: saline nasal spray from the chemist

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, independent, keeps the bedroom air-conditioner running which makes the air quite dry

objective_data_offered.value: I felt hot and a bit feverish earlier today but I haven't actually measured my temperature
on camera he's breathing through his mouth a lot and sounds very bunged up, but he's talking in full sentences and isn't gasping for air
no visible struggling to breathe, no blue lips, chest is not heaving on video; a pile of used tissues is next to him
